items.name_en: Premium Factory Leather M25903 Black Small This Capucines small bag draws inspiration from Baroque jewelry, incorporating shell Monogram floral decorations on the chain to reflect the dynamic style of the new Daydream series. Taurillon calfskin creates an exquisite structure, with the flap either open or closed. Removable shoulder strap for flexible carrying. Dimensions: 27 × 17.3 × 9 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier original leather M15157 Avocado Green Small Capucines series is named after the Paris street where Louis Vuitton opened its first store in 1854. This Capucines mini bag features a woven leather handle, tassel decoration, and a lock, highlighting the iconic elements of the Crafty series. The LV monogram features a jacquard effect, cleverly showcasing the brand's exquisite craftsmanship. Dimensions: 17.3 × 9 × 27 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier original leather M25466 Small Crafty series once again imbues the Capucines BB bag with artisanal light. Taurillon cow leather shapes a classic silhouette, while the woven handle adds a sophisticated touch. The LV lettering displays a jacquard effect, and a detachable tassel hangs below the lock. Dimensions: 17.3 x 9 x 27 cm (H x W x D)
